title: ItemEdit fabric
description: A fully recoded version of the ItemEdit plugin for fabric client side 1.20.5 to 1.21.6
body:
# ItemEdit Fabric

A Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.20.5-26.1.2 that provides powerful item editing capabilities through client-side commands.

## Features

### Main Command: `/ie`

Comprehensive item editing with commands for:

* **Basic Properties**

  * `/ie rename <name>` - Rename items
  * `/ie lore <text>` - Add custom lore (supports comma-separated lines)
  * `/ie amount <count>` - Change stack size
  * `/ie unbreakable <on/off>` - Make items unbreakable
  * `/ie repaircost <cost>` - Set repair cost
  * `/ie durability <value>` - Modify item durability
  * `/ie hidetooltip <true/false>` - Hide or show item tooltips
  * `/ie glow <on/off>` - Toggle enchantment glint effect
  * `/ie rarity <rarity>` - Change item rarity (COMMON/UNCOMMON/RARE/EPIC)

* **Advanced Customization**

  * `/ie enchant <enchantment> <level>` - Add enchantments
  * `/ie bookenchant <enchantment> <level>` - Add stored enchantments to enchanted books
  * `/ie attribute <attribute> <amount> <slot> <operation> <showTooltip>` - Add attribute modifiers
  * `/ie equippable <slot> [sound] [armortype] [damage_on_hurt] [dispenseable] [swappable] [overlay]` - Make items equippable with custom equipment properties
  * `/ie itemdisguise <item>` - Change an item's appearance to another item

* **Special Items**

  * `/ie leathercolor <r> <g> <b> <showTooltip>` - Customize leather armor colors
  * `/ie potioncolor <r> <g> <b>` - Set potion colors
  * `/ie fireworkpower <power>` - Adjust firework rocket power
  * `/ie bookstuff <author> <title> <generation>` - Edit written books
  * `/ie trim <pattern> <material>` - Apply armor trims
  * `/ie foodify <nutrition> <saturation> <eatTime> <alwaysEat> <convertItem> <animation> <consumeParticles>` - Turn any item into food
  * `/ie glider <on/off>` - Give items Elytra-style gliding functionality

* **Mob & Entity Item Variants**

  * `/ie axolotlvariant <variant>` - Set axolotl bucket variants (blue/pink/yellow/brown/cyan)
  * `/ie tropicalfish <pattern> <patternColor> <bodyColor>` - Customize tropical fish bucket appearance

## Usage Notes

* All commands require Creative Mode
* RGB color values support up to 16.7 million colors
* Tab completion available for all commands
* Changes are made client-side and sent to server so creative is required

## Requirements

* Fabric 1.21 or above
* Fabric Loader
* Fabric API

## Installation

1. Install Fabric Loader and Fabric API
2. Place the mod JAR in your `mods` folder
3. Launch Minecraft

---
